name: Chocolate & Peanut Butter Truffles
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the peanut butter chips with butter over low heat.
2. Stir in cocoa until smooth.
3. Add sweetened condensed milk and vanilla; cook and stir until thickened and well blended, about 4 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and chill for 2 hours or until firm enough to handle.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll the truffles in one of the optional coatings: finely chopped nuts, unsweetened chocolate, graham cracker crumbs, or confectioner's sugar.
7. Chill until firm, about 1 hour.
8. Store covered in the refrigerator.
(This makes about 3 dozen)
